feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is footer in fiori launchpad below the tiles possible?
entry.content:
Can we add a footer in the Fiori launchpad below the tiles?  I want to show the system name and client ID at the bottom of the Fiori launchpad no matter what page or tiles we have clicked.
We are currently using S/4 Hana Ds4 050

entry.title: BAPI TO CREATE CUSTOMER MATERIAL INFO RECORD CLASSIFICATION (VD51)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create Customer Material Info Record Classification in VD51 with respective customer code and Material Number.

How to create that using BAPI?

What BAPI is available for that? 

Reg, 
Prakash

entry.title: No Backend Services Found API_TASK_SPI_REPLICATION
entry.content:
I am getting this
No Backend Services Found

when trying to add API_TASK_SPI_REPLICATION with tcode /n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICES to activate in the "Activate and Maintain Services" .

I have tried everything and with all System Alias

Tried this /n/iwbep/reg_service but still cant add this service.
Does it need to be added when the system was provisioned?
Am I missing something?

Thanks for any help.

Ger

entry.title: How do I configure automated financial closing in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content:
I'm trying to set up automated financial closing in SAP S/4HANA. Could someone guide me through the configuration steps or share any resources that could help?
thanks in advance if anyone can help me with it.........

entry.title: Email Notification template setting in S4HANA
entry.content:
I want to send email notification after Purchase Requisition creation in s4hana.

I copy predelivered email template SWF_CRT_NOTIFIY_RECIPIENTS and create custom template name YY1_02000458_CRT_19.

I want to know which settings are needed to get email notification of this template.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: S4: Customizing not active after import - table buffer issue
entry.content:
There is a problem in transport management on a SAP S/4HANA 2020 landscape hosted on Hyperscaler (private system).

Problem:

  • SAP Transport is released in the dev system, contains customizing of a maintenance view.
  • Transport Is imported in Q or Prod, but the customizing is not active after import.
  • Although the entries are changed in the underlying table (check in SE16H), they still appear unchanged in the view. The system contiues to behave in a way, that new customizing is not active.

The remedy is to manually reset all table buffers (/$SYNC), a system reboot will do the same.

I do not have this issue with other customer so much, so this must be a system setting? Basis Team cannot find the root cause. But we do not have this problem at all/other customers... so there must be some setting in the system?

entry.title: QM Notification Number Range Issue
entry.content:
Hello Team,
I have activated checkbox Early Number Allocation against Notification Type in Configuration.
When I try to create a notification using QM01 but don't save and come back.
Then I try to create the notification again the Notification number series is skipped and taking the next number series.
Why is this behavior so and what can be done to solve the same ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: QUNIT version version
entry.content:
Question: What is the procedure to upgrade a QUNIT version

entry.title: Create data using Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchronous)
entry.content:
Hello, 

I want to create data to S4 hana system using "Journal Entry - Clearing (Asynchronous) as in the the link . 

But I cannot create and there is error of "Balance in transaction currency Balance in transaction currency JPY 220,000 is too large for automatic correction is too large for automatic correction". I have also tested by changing the tolerance amount in configuration setting. But still getting the same error.

While creating from "Post Incoming Payment" app, there is the field "Amount" to make the total balance zero. 

But in api, I didn't see any field to add the amount value to make the total balance zero. 

Could you please guide me how to create the data using that api? 

Could you please provide me the correct soap code with sample? 

Best Regards,

Pyae

 

#S4Hana #JE Clearing #Post incoming payments

entry.title: Settlement calculation on the basis of Business volume customer for Single Payee contract
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a scenario where the condition contract is created for a different customer (A) in the header (to settle the accruals against) single payee, and a different customer (B) in the Business Volume table (to post the accruals against). When we check the line items for the accruals from billing documents, the line item is recorded against B, which is correct as this is the customer from the BV table and we also maintained the condition record for the customer (B). However, when the delta accruals are posted or settlement documents are posted, the system is not able to derive the customer from the business volume table, and hence the condition record is not determining for customer (B). Instead, customer (A) is determining, and for customer (A), there is no record in the system, resulting in the documents being created with zero value.

Is there a configuration setting to adjust this so that customer (B) will determine and find the condition record?

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: CDS Preview - Number of entries and rows retrieved does not match
entry.content:
Hi,

when using the data preview (F8) for an cds entity, many more rows are displayed than number of entries shows.

How can i fix this behavior?
best regards.

entry.title: sap hana security
entry.content: How to configure network access restrictions for HANA database

entry.title: In my S/4HANA Cloud 3S the App Manage Your Solution is missing.
entry.content:
My task is to implement a S/4 HANA Cloud 3S for my Company. The documentation says i shall check the scope Item 4GT in the "Manage Your Solution" App. But there is no such App in the System. I really dont know how to proceed. This is the documentation i got reffered to from the CBC : https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/4GT_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

Thanks in advantage
Jose

entry.title: Mass updates of New Tax Category (condition type_
entry.content:
Dear,

We are working ON S/4 HANA conversion project. now we are doing post conversion activities on S/4 HANA.

when we synchronized customer to BP on ECC, that time TAX category (Tax condition type) was CNXJ. 

now on S/4 we have created new TAX category UTXJ, when we opened BP for existing customer in display mode we don't see this UTXJ in billing tab of sales area (FLCU01) but when we clicked on Change mode, we can see new tax category.

Is this expected behavior of system? what should be do to see see new tax category in display mode only without going to change mode.?

Thank you

entry.title: Reverse notes receivable in F-20
entry.content:
I have a question about the journal entries for notes receivable.
Is it possible to journalize a dishonored bill on the F-20? If so, what journal entry would be posted?

After receipt of the bill, the journal entry for bill receivable/receivable is posted on the F-36. Then post the journal entry for bank bill collection account/contingent note receivable on FBWE.
If the bill is subsequently found to be dishonored, is it possible to journalize the dishonored bill/bank collection account on F-20 and the contingent liability on the bill receivable/ bill receivable on F-20?

I'd like to know if the F-20 alone is sufficient for a dishonored bill.

entry.title: Controller Extension override issue
entry.content:
we want to add some other parameters so that search can be completed on those columns/parameters as well.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Inconsistencies occurred in target system when we transported Storage location addresses
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Inconsistencies occurred in target system when we transported Storage location addresses from source system.

In the source system: The number of addresses in the TWLAD table matches the number in the ADRC table.

In the target system: The number of addresses in the TWLAD table does not match the number in the ADRC table.

 

SAP Product: S4HANA ON PREMISE

Release: 2023

 

Thanks and Regards,

Manohar.

entry.title: How to create a custom event on double click for a View table created with TMG
entry.content:
Hello guys, 

I want to make a feature that goes like this: on a double click of a field in a custom view of a table, i want to call another transaction(se80) that will display a method stored inside that field (that's my configuration table that has the names of the methods). How to implement something like this ? I've found in a screen painter that there is an option for field where I can implement a respond on double click, but nothing on where to actually implement the logic for an event. Please help.

double click event from a screen painter

entry.title: How to download reports S_ALR_87013558 and S_ALR_87013533 in MS excel?
entry.content:
Unable to download reports S_ALR_87013558 and S_ALR_87013533 in MS excel. What is the correct way to enable downloading of report in excel?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it possible to report CBTA test results at configuration test case level on Composite scripts?
entry.content:
Is it possible to report CBTA test results at the configuration test case/script level with the individual configuration scripts being included in the Composite scripts?  I'm executing a Test Plan/Test Package automatically/immediately.

For example, say I have Composite script "ZCOMP_SAP_OTC_Create, change and display sales order" and the Test Script Steps include 1. VA01 - Create Sales Order, 2. VA02 Change Sales Order and 3. VA03 Display Sales Order.  When I execute all my scripts within a Test Plan/Test Package currently the test status reporting is from the composite level only.  So, if only the VA03 fails, then the test result that is report is an overall failure for the composite script.  In CBTA, is there a way to display results (pass/fail) for each of the test script steps with the composite script (in this example VA01, VA02 and VA03) instead of only reporting from the composite script level?

I've checked configurable reports, logs, Test Package Status tab, but I don't see a way...  Below is the Status tab of a Test Package that displays the composition scripts failed (no individual test case status), and this is how all the reporting seems to behave.
